facade_description: 181 Augusta Ave presents a commercial street frontage within the Kensington Market HCD. The street frontage spans roughly 5.2 metres across 3 storeys beneath a cross-gable, consistent with its commercial typology. The frontage is defined primarily by wood siding, laid in running bond with light grey mortar joints. The facade is organized as a storefront base with 2 upper-window bays and 1 additional bay above, using double-hung sash windows, and 1 principal entrance. HCD note: Each property has value as an early-twentieth-century, two-storey commercial addition to a nineteenth-century residential structure which is not visible from the public realm. Through its construction date and typology, each property is associated with the District’s pattern of commercial adaptation
